inputs.label: Font Size (Points)
inputs.businessContext: The font size in points (1 pt = 1/72 inch). Standard sizes: 10, 11, 12, 14.

inputs.label: Screen PPI
inputs.businessContext: Pixel density (pixels per inch) of the target display. Common: 96 (Windows), 72 (Mac).

inputs.label: Base Font Size (Pixels)
inputs.businessContext: Browser default root font size in pixels, used for em/percentage calculation. Typically 16px.

inputs.label: Root Font Size (Pixels)
inputs.businessContext: Explicit root element font size for rem calculation. Default equals base font size.

inputs.label: Custom Scaling Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Additional multiplicative factor for custom-converted size (e.g., 1.2 for 120%).
